Combine several MizerParams objects

Source: R/bindParams.R
bindParams.Rd

Takes several MizerParams objects and fuses them into a single MizerParams object containing all species. The interaction matrix of the combined object is set to all zeros.

Usage

bindParams(...)

Arguments

...

Two or more MizerParams objects to combine. Alternatively a single list of MizerParams objects.

Value

A MizerParams object containing all species from all input params objects.

Details

All input params objects must have identical w and w_full slots and identical resource_params. No duplicate species names are allowed.

The species_params, given_species_params and gear_params data frames are combined with rbind(). The per-species arrays from the various slots are stacked along the species dimension. The interaction matrix is set to all zeros. All other slots (resource spectrum, rates functions, etc.) are taken from the first params object. Any comment attributes on slots are preserved; if multiple input objects carry comments on the same slot, the comments are combined after removing duplicates.

See also

mizer::addSpecies(), mizer::removeSpecies()

On this page
